rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper is directly in the citing paper’s core prior-work niche: both study two-person sales group commissions and incentive design, and the citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior work that mostly compared individual vs. group incentives. The cited note provides exactly that comparison framework (individual vs hybrid/revenue-sharing, group-pay weights, social conditions), making it a plausible theory/benchmark source rather than an incidental mention.
